Fit the M2 production GAM on all training seasons

Source: R/pipeline_training.R
train_m2.Rd

Trains the Stage-2 GAM on all non-excluded seasons using the best spec from build_m2(). Runs M1 walk-forward predictions before fitting.

Usage

train_m2(
  allD,
  m0,
  m1,
  best_spec = NULL,
  exclude = c("2011-12", "2015-16", "2020-21", "2021-22"),
  verbose = FALSE
)

Arguments

allD

Multi-season surveillance data frame.

m0

Output of tune_m0(). Must include best_params.

m1

Output of build_m1(). Provides ref and hyper.

best_spec

Stage-2 spec from build_m2()$best_spec or stage2_make_spec(). When NULL, uses the locked deployed v16 specification for a production-data refresh without retuning.

exclude

Character vector of seasons to exclude from training. Default excludes permanent invalid seasons and 2015-16. Note: 2025-26 is kept (production training uses the current season).

verbose

Logical. Print progress.

Value

A list with fit (GAM), feature_ranges, m1_train_preds, spec, training_seasons, and spec_version. Pass to assemble_kit().
